channel.title: C/C++ on Himanshu Sharma's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in C/C++ on Himanshu Sharma's Blog

item.title: neuralnetworkc
item.description:
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/enerhim/neuralnetworkc

This was a learning project of mine for learning the implementation of nns using vectorized gradient descent and backpropagation.

For the MNIST Handwritten Digits, the layer structure: {784, 256, 128, 10}, alpha = 0.1 w/ decay, epochs = 1000 over 60k images (full batch gradient descent): The model achieved 93.20% accuracy on 10k test images.
With almost the same structure and hyperparameters as above, the MNIST Fashion Dataset acheived 84.15% accuracy on 10k test images. A larger hidden layer structure will likely lead to much better performance due to higher complexity of images despite them being the same size.
